definition:
ἀνα-φέρω 
 [in LXX chiefly for עָלָה hi., also for קָטַר hi., etc. ;] 
  1. to carry or lead up: with accusative of person(s), Mat.17:1, Mrk.9:2; pass., Luk.24:51 (WH, rejects, R, mg. omits); ἀ. τ. ἁμαρτίας ἐπί τ. ξύλον (see Deiss., 135, 88 f.;  ICC, in l; MM, VGT, see word): 1Pe.2:24. 
   2. In LXX and NT, to bring to the altar, to offer (see Hort on 1Pe, l.with): θυσίας, etc., Heb.7:27 13:15, 1Pe.2:5; ἐπί τ. θυσιαστήριον, Jas.2:21 (see Mayor, in l). 
   3. to bear, sustain (cf. Num.14:33, Isa.53:12): Heb.9:28.†
 (AS)
